The '''Zephry Asteroid field''' was a location in the [[Zephry system/Legends|Zephry system]] where [[Ace Azzameen/Legends|Ace Azzameen]] on the ''[[Otana/Legends|Otana]]'' rendezvoused with [[Aeron]] in order to deliver to her a [[Mission to the Saila Na system|captured]] [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Viper probe droid/Legends|Viper probe droid]] from the [[Saila Na system/Legends|Saila Na system]].<ref name="XWA" />

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance]]'' {{1st}}
